zh.lifeSummary: 當Peter Gresley Earl of Derby於1273年出生在英國德比夏爾時，他的父親Godfrey Gresley Lord of Derby30歲，母親Agnes Anneys de Morton25歲。他和Johanna Stafford至少有6個兒子。他去世於1310年在他的家鄉享年37歲，埋葬在英國德比夏爾邱奇 格萊斯利。

nameMeanings.name: Gresley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Greasley
meanings: 1  English: locative name, usually from Greasley (Notts) but possibly also from Gresley (Derbys). Some of the following early bearers may alternatively belong under (2), particularly the Lancs examples.

2 Norman, English: nickname, either from Old French greslet ‘marked as by hail’, i.e. pitted or pock-marked, or Old French greslet, gresli, grailet ‘thin, slim’. In early forms, the nickname has sometimes been confused with the place-name in (1). Compare Le Gresley in Jersey and Greslé, Grêlé in France.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Peter Gresley Earl of Derby was born in 1273, in Derbyshire, England, his father, Godfrey Gresley Lord of Derby, was 30 and his mother, Agnes Anneys de Morton, was 25. He had at least 6 sons with Johanna Stafford. He died in 1310, in his hometown, at the age of 37, and was buried in Church Gresley, Derbyshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Peter Gresley Earl of Derby est né en 1273, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Godfrey Gresley Lord of Derby, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Agnes Anneys de Morton, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils avec Johanna Stafford. Il est décédé en 1310, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Church Gresley, Derbyshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Peter Gresley Earl of Derby 1273 in Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Godfrey Gresley Lord of Derby 30 und seine Mutter Agnes Anneys de Morton 25. Er hatte mit Johanna Stafford mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb 1310 im Alter von 37 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Church Gresley, Derbyshire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Peter Gresley Earl of Derbyが1273年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアで生まれた時，父Godfrey Gresley Lord of Derbyは30歳，母Agnes Anneys de Mortonは25歳であった。彼はJohanna Staffordとの間に少なくとも6人の息子をもうけた。彼は1310年に故郷で37歳で死去し，イギリスデルブイシュアイアチャーチ グレスリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Peter Gresley Earl of Derby(이)가 1273년 영국 더비실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Godfrey Gresley Lord of Derby(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Anneys de Morton(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Johanna Stafford(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1310년 그의 고향에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 더비실르 c후르치 그레슬리에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peter Gresley Earl of Derby родился в 1273 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Godfrey Gresley Lord of Derby было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Anneys de Morton, 25. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей от Johanna Stafford. Он умер в 1310 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности чурч гресли, дирбишир, Англия.
